rows.key_dev: AT&T completed $5.75B acquisition of Lumen consumer fiber assets (closed Feb 2026) and EchoStar deal; net leverage guided to ~3.2x, declining to ~3x by YE2026. Issued multi-tranche bonds Apr 2026.

Verizon closed Frontier acquisition Jan 20 2026, integrating ~$28.3B of subsidiary debt; Q1 2026 beat with first positive Q1 postpaid phone net adds since 2013; raised 2026 adjusted EPS guidance to +5-6% YoY.

Q1 2026 revenue +11% to $31.46B driven by Milano-Cortina Olympics and Super Bowl 60; 2026 is largest broadband investment year in company history with simplified pricing rollout. Versant spin-off completed Dec 2025.
Q2 FY2026 adj EPS $1.57 beat; targeting 12% FY2026 adj EPS growth; $8B share repurchase target FY2026. Fitch affirmed A-/Stable flagging capex pressure from parks and cruise fleet expansion.

Paramount agreed to acquire WBD for $110B EV ($31/share) on Feb 27 2026; WBD board rejected offer recommending Netflix deal instead. All three agencies downgraded WBD to sub-investment grade in Jun 2025 on separation/M&A risk; ratings under review.

Netflix walked away from WBD studio/streaming deal after Paramount outbid; Q1 2026 strong with 31.5% operating margin target for FY2026. Moody's noted Netflix A/A3 profile on investment grade balance sheet with $12B+ FCF estimate for 2026.
Q1 2026 results reported Apr 29; AWS growth accelerating; Alphabet, Microsoft, Meta and Apple all reported strong Q1 2026 earnings with continued record capex commitments to AI infrastructure.

Q1 2026 reported Apr 29; Google Cloud growth accelerating with +48% in Q4 2025; $175-185B 2026 capex reiterated. Roughly 75% of Google programming now AI-generated per reports; no material credit events.
Q1 2026 reported Apr 29; Azure and cloud continue strong growth momentum; raised 2026 capex budget. No material credit events.

Feb 1 2026: Oracle announced plan to raise $45-50B in 2026 via equity, convertibles and bonds to fund OCI expansion; Q2 FY2026 FCF was negative $13.2B vs +$9.5B prior year as CapEx surge intensifies. S&P/Moody's monitoring leverage trajectory.
Q4 FY2026 adj EPS $3.81 beat estimate of $2.69 by 42%; Q1 FY2027 earnings due May 27 2026. Agentforce AI platform driving customer expansion; no material adverse credit events.
Q1 2026 reported Apr 22; double-digit Software and Infrastructure revenue growth; reiterated 5%+ CC revenue growth and ~$1B FCF increase for FY2026. No material credit events.

Fiscal Q2 2026 revenue $111.2B +17% YoY; iPhone revenue +22%; Q3 FY2026 guidance of +14-17% revenue growth well above consensus. Services growth accelerating; best earnings among Mag-7 cohort per analyst commentary.

Apr 7 2026: boosted share repurchase authorization to ~$779M; launched NKP Metal and Agentic AI enhancements; $150M private equity sale to AMD. Q3 FY2026 earnings due May 27 2026; VMware displacement catalyst intact.
Q2 FY2026 earnings call set for May 27 2026. PC and printing market conditions remain mixed amid tariff uncertainty; no material adverse credit events in last 60 days.
Q2 FY2026 results expected early June 2026; analysts forecasting robust double-digit EPS growth driven by AI server demand and GreenLake ARR growth. No material adverse credit events.
FY2026 record revenue $113.5B +19%; $64B AI-optimized server orders; $43B record backlog entering FY2027; 20% dividend increase and $10B buyback authorization; FY2027 revenue guidance +23% midpoint.

FY2026 full-year revenue +20% YoY; record backlog $5.25B+; Q4 FY2026 earnings reported ~May 2026; plans to manufacture power conversion products in US; acquisition announced to accelerate power conversion business launch.
Q2 FY2026 earnings call held late April 2026; solid revenue execution amid AI-driven infrastructure demand. No material credit events in last 60 days.
Announced spin-off of data center EMS business (~$6.6Bn revenue) and acquisition of Electrical Power Products. S&P affirmed BBB-/Stable May 6 2026; pro forma leverage expected to remain below 3x.
Q2 FY2026 revenue $8.3B beat expectations; raised FY2026 outlook; CEO cited strong execution across revenue, core operating margin and core EPS. No material credit events.
Q1 2026 revenue $9.5B +39% YoY, above high end of guidance; EPS $4.55 and non-GAAP EPS $5.22 both above guidance; new interim CEO Bill Austen leading company.
No material news.
No material news.
Q1 2026 net sales $14.0B +13.7% YoY; completed March secondary offering of 10.3M shares; authorized $100M incremental share repurchase; Q2 guidance $13.6-14.0B revenue.
Q1 2026 net sales $5.68B +9.2% YoY; gross profit $1.19B. No material credit events in last 60 days.

Q3 FY2026 (Dec 2025 qtr) revenues $3.9B +3% YoY; adjusted EBITDA $696M; company announced leadership changes Feb 2026; Q4 FY2026 results due late May 2026. Kyndryl Consult delivering double-digit growth.
No material news.
Q1 2026 results reported Apr 29; FY2026 revenue guidance $10.14-10.24B (+10-11% YoY); Q2 2026 revenue guided $2.571-2.611B; 60% of largest deals AI-driven; xScale JV portfolio at 430MW.
FY2025 revenue $6.11B; FY2026 guided to $6.6-6.7B; Adj EBITDA $3.6-3.7B. Record Q4 capacity delivery; strong AI-driven leasing demand sustains outlook. No material credit events.
Q1 2026 net income +75.9%; AFFO +2.6% to $1.324B; $184M buybacks in Q1; 55MW data center capacity under construction; structural growth drivers strengthening with AI workload demand.

Q2 FY2026 net revenue $11.2B +17% YoY; $6.0B GAAP net income; board authorized new $20B multi-year share repurchase program. Strong cross-border volume and payments growth across all metrics.
Completed 25-for-1 stock split effective Apr 2 2026; Q1 2026 earnings reported Apr 28; $21.8B remaining buyback authorization; 9.4% dividend increase; FY2025 FCF $9.09B +15% YoY.
Q1 2026 gross bookings $53.7B +21% CC; 50M Uber One members; adj EBITDA +33% to $2.48B; FCF $2.3B in quarter; strong Q2 2026 guidance of $56.25-57.75B gross bookings.
Q1 2026 record revenue $14.2B +9.4% YoY; EPS $0.64 beat; $1.2B FCF; ordered 95 new aircraft; FY2026 revenue guided to $68.1B. Stock +85% over prior twelve months.

Q1 2026 record revenues $6.2B; gross margin yields +10%; announced $2.5B initial share buyback program; introduced PROPEL targets through 2029. Record booked position at historically high prices; deleveraging continues.

Q1 2026 adj EPS $3.60 beat guidance; returned $1.1B to shareholders; strong demand recovery post-March dip; Icon VI and VII ordered; Royal Beach Club Santorini launched; double-digit revenue/earnings growth guided for FY2026.

Q1 2026 (May 4): slashed FY2026 adj EPS guidance ~30% to $1.45-1.79; net yield guided to decline 3-5%; new CEO Chidsey (appointed Feb 12) flagging execution missteps; Elliott activist pressure; stock -23% YTD through May 4 2026.
Q1 2026 EPS $3.70 vs $2.61 est; raised 2026 adj EBIT guidance to $13.5–$15.5B aided by ~$500M IEEPA tariff refund.
Q1 2026 adj EPS $0.41 beat est; CEO Musk confirmed affordable Model Y/3 trims amid brand headwinds and EV competition. Revenue missed est.
Q1 2026 adj EPS $0.66 beat; raised 2026 adj EBIT to $8.5–$10.5B; Model e losses narrowing; tariff refund pending.
FY Q3 EPS $6.26 beat est $3.80; U.S. tariff headwinds cited but full-year JPY 3.4T operating income forecast maintained; US local production ramp ongoing.
All three agencies rate Nissan sub-IG or low IG with Negative outlook; Re:Nissan restructuring (9k job cuts, 20% capacity reduction) underway; FY net loss expected ~¥650B.
Moody's affirmed Baa3 Stable (Dec 2025) and Fitch raised outlook to Stable (Jun 2025); CEO confirmed 737 MAX production ramp 'all systems go'; FCF positive 2026 expected.
Q1 2026 orders +87%, revenue +25%, adj EPS +25% to $1.86; free cash flow $1.7B; trending to high-end of 2026 guidance.
